scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace managerbeyo-app-managers --workspace managerbeyo-app-workers --workspace managerbeyo-app-sellers && tsc -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/hooks/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/realtime/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/notifications/tsconfig.json --noEmit
